title: AppNameWithVersionType
content:
# AppNameWithVersionType

Inherits from: StringParamType


Click Custom App name with version validator
Validates for app name with version "someapp:1.0.0" and/or container name "somecontainer.app"

Attributes
----------
version_required: bool, optional, default False
    If True, version needs to be present in the string  e.g. "app:1.0.0"
allow_container: bool, optional, default False
    If True, also the container name is allowed in the following format "somecontainer.app"


## Methods


### __init__(version_required: bool, allow_container: bool) -> None


### convert(value: str, param: Optional[Parameter], ctx: Optional[Context]) -> str


### validate_container(value: str, param: Optional[Parameter], ctx: Optional[Context]) -> None


### validate_app_name_with_version(value: str, param: Optional[Parameter], ctx: Optional[Context]) -> None
